title: Load configuration successfully using a valid path
description: Verifies a user can change the config path, load it, and see a success indication and updated status.

steps.description: Verify element "Config path input field" is visible

title: Show error when configuration load fails for an invalid path
description: Verifies an invalid config path shows an error message and indicates no config is loaded.

steps.description: Verify element "Config path input field" is visible
Verify text "No config loaded" is visible

title: Load button is actionable after editing the config path
description: Verifies the user can edit the config path field and initiate a load without UI preventing the action.

steps.description: Verify element "Config path input field" is visible

title: Whitespace-trimmed path input still loads successfully
description: Verifies leading/trailing spaces in the path do not prevent a successful config load (if supported by the UI/backend).

steps.description: Verify element "Config path input field" is visible

title: Attempting to load with an empty config path shows a visible failure state
description: Verifies clearing the config path and clicking Load results in a visible error or non-loaded state message.

steps.description: Verify element "Config path input field" is visible
Verify text "No config loaded" is visible

title: Status bar updates from previous state after a successful load
description: Verifies that after loading, the visible status reflects the new loaded config path rather than a stale value.

title: Error state is visible after switching from a successful load to an invalid path
description: Verifies that a later load failure shows an error and the status reflects no config loaded (or equivalent failure indication).

steps.description: Verify text "No config loaded" is visible

title: Load a valid tub from a relative path and verify metadata is shown
description: Verifies a user can enter a valid relative tub path, load the tub, and see record count and fields reflected in the UI.

steps.description: Verify element "Tub path input field" is visible
Type "./data" into the "Tub path" input field

title: Load a non-existent tub path and verify error state and status bar
description: Verifies an invalid tub path shows an error message and the status bar indicates no tub is loaded.

steps.description: Verify element "Tub path input field" is visible
Type "/nonexistent/tub" into the "Tub path" input field
Verify text "No tub loaded" is visible

title: Attempt to load with an empty tub path and verify an error is shown
description: Verifies the loader does not proceed successfully when the tub path is blank and the UI shows an error state.

steps.description: Verify element "Tub path input field" is visible
Type "" into the "Tub path" input field
Verify text "No tub loaded" is visible

title: Verify loading indicator appears when starting a tub load
description: Verifies the UI provides immediate loading feedback after clicking Load.

steps.description: Type "./data" into the "Tub path" input field

title: Load a valid tub after a failed load and verify success replaces the error state
description: Verifies recovery behavior: after an error load attempt, a valid load succeeds and the UI shows success and record metadata.

steps.description: Type "/nonexistent/tub" into the "Tub path" input field
Type "./data" into the "Tub path" input field

title: Load a second tub path and verify the status bar updates to the new record count
description: Verifies loading a tub updates the status bar record count, and re-loading with a different path updates it again.

steps.description: Type "./data" into the "Tub path" input field
Type "./data" into the "Tub path" input field

title: Enter a tub path with leading/trailing spaces and verify load behavior is handled
description: Verifies the loader handles whitespace in the tub path input and still results in a clear success or error message.

steps.description: Verify element "Tub path input field" is visible
Type "  ./data  " into the "Tub path" input field

title: Load main page and display current tub record image and metadata
description: Verifies the Tub Navigator shows an initial record image and basic playback status on first load.

steps.description: Verify element "current record image" is visible
Verify element "current record metadata" is visible

title: Next advances one record and updates the displayed image
description: Verifies clicking Next navigates forward by one record and updates the image preview.

steps.description: Verify element "current record image" is visible
Verify element "current record image" is visible
Verify element "current record metadata" is visible

title: Previous navigates back one record and updates the displayed image
description: Verifies clicking Previous navigates backward by one record and updates the image preview.

steps.description: Verify element "current record image" is visible
Verify element "current record image" is visible
Verify element "current record metadata" is visible

title: First jumps to start of tub and Last jumps to end
description: Verifies First and Last controls jump to the beginning and end of the record range and update visible record info.

steps.description: Verify element "current record metadata" is visible
Verify element "current record metadata" is visible

title: Render steering and throttle line chart when tub data is available
description: Verifies the chart area renders with steering and throttle series when data is loaded and visible on the main page.

title: Empty chart placeholder appears when chart data is not loaded
description: Verifies that an empty/failed chart load shows a placeholder state prompting the user to load tub data.

steps.description: Wait for element "line chart" to appear

title: Error message is shown with empty chart state when data fails to load
description: Verifies an error message is visible in the chart area when chart data is empty or failed to load.

steps.description: Wait for element "chart area" to appear
Verify text "prompting to load tub data" is visible

title: Apply valid temporary filter and verify filtered record count updates
description: Verifies that a valid filter expression can be applied and the UI reflects the filtered record count.

steps.description: Click on the "Data Cleaner" panel header or button to open the Data Cleaner panel
Type "user_throttle>0.1" into the filter expression input
Verify element "Filtered record count" is visible

title: Delete records by index range with confirmation and verify success feedback
description: Verifies deletion by index range requires confirmation and shows a success message after completion.

steps.description: Click on the "Data Cleaner" panel header or button to open the Data Cleaner panel
Type "10" into the index range start input
Type "20" into the index range end input

title: End-to-end: Apply filter then delete index range and verify record count and chart update
description: Verifies the full cleaning workflow updates the visible record set, including counts and the chart area, after confirming deletion.

steps.description: Click on the "Data Cleaner" panel header or button to open the Data Cleaner panel
Type "user_throttle>0.1" into the filter expression input
Verify element "Filtered record count" is visible
Type "10" into the index range start input
Type "20" into the index range end input

title: Invalid filter expression shows validation error and does not apply filter
description: Verifies an invalid filter expression displays a validation error message.

steps.description: Click on the "Data Cleaner" panel header or button to open the Data Cleaner panel
Type "user_throttle>>>0.1" into the filter expression input

title: Fix invalid filter to valid and successfully apply after seeing error
description: Verifies the user can correct an invalid filter and then apply a valid filter successfully.

steps.description: Click on the "Data Cleaner" panel header or button to open the Data Cleaner panel
Type "user_throttle>>>0.1" into the filter expression input
Type "user_throttle>0.1" into the filter expression input
Verify element "Filtered record count" is visible

title: Cancel out of invalid filter state without applying changes
description: Verifies the user can cancel/close the invalid filter workflow without applying a filter.

steps.description: Click on the "Data Cleaner" panel header or button to open the Data Cleaner panel
Type "user_throttle>>>0.1" into the filter expression input

title: Deletion confirmation modal can be dismissed without deleting
description: Verifies the delete confirmation modal supports canceling and does not show a success message afterward.

steps.description: Click on the "Data Cleaner" panel header or button to open the Data Cleaner panel
Type "10" into the index range start input
Type "20" into the index range end input

title: Status bar remains visible while navigating within the main console sections
description: Verifies the status bar persists on screen as a global context indicator on the main page.
